title: oxystelma violacea
intro: Oxystelma violacea is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antitumor and anti-inflammatory activities. Studies have shown that Oxystelma violacea has various health benefits, including the potential to protect against cancer, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
